//: Extends tsconfig.build.json (not the dev tsconfig.json) so the nuxt-module-build pass resolves @vuecs/* via their package.json exports (dist .d.ts) instead of the dev-only source path aliases — matching how every other package's build pipeline consumes its dependencies. Inheriting the source aliases makes module-builder re-type-check workspace deps' source (e.g. @vuecs/core's .vue re-exports) under its own settings.
